decoded: Courage is what it takes to stand up and speak. Courage is also what it takes to sit down and listen. (W. Churchill)
Education is like a double-edged sword. It may be turned to dangerous uses if it is not properly handled. (Wu Ting-Fang)
Love is friendship, set on fire. (Jeremy Taylor)
Love is composed of a single soul inhabiting two bodies. (Aristotle)
Love is like a virus. It can happen to anybody at any time. (Maya Angelou)
True friends stab you in the front. (Oscar Wilde)
